entry.title: New GWAC 47QTCK18D0047 awarded to ECS FEDERAL, LLC for the amount of $2,500

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/ITS GWACBRANCH A CONT OP QTACA

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF GOVERNMENT-WIDE ACQUISITION CONTRACTS PROVIDE WORLDWIDE ACCESS TO IT SOLUTIONS SUCH AS SYSTEMS DESIGN, SOFTWARE ENGINEERING, INFORMATION ASSURANCE, AND ENTERPRISE ARCHITECTURE SOLUTIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0047 (PA0001) awarded to ECS FEDERAL, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/ITS GWACBRANCH A CONT OP QTACA

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS UNILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO ISSUE NOTICE TO PROCEED AND EFFECTIVE DATE. MODIFICATION PA01 IS HEREBY ISSUED TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING ADMINISTRATIVE CHANGES: THE EFFECTIVE DATE OF THE 17 NOVEMBER 2017 AWARDED ALLIANT 2 GWAC IS JULY 1, 2018. THE NOTICE TO PROCEED DATE IS JULY 1, 2018. THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE (POP) AND ORDERING PERIOD OF THE MASTER CONTRACT ARE AS FOLLOWS: BASE PERIOD: JULY 1, 2018 TO JUNE 30, 2023 OPTION PERIOD: JULY 1, 2023 TO JUNE 30, 2028

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0047 (PA0014) awarded to ECS FEDERAL, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION PA0014 IS ISSUED TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION I, PARAGRAPH I.12, CLAUSE 52.217-9 OPTION TO EXTEND THE TERM OF THE CONTRACT (MAR 2000), THE GOVERNMENT HEREBY EXERCISES ITS OPTION TO EXTEND THE TERM OF THE CONTRACT FOR THE PERIOD BEGINNING JULY 1, 2023 THROUGH JUNE 30, 2028. ALL OTHER CONTRACT TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MAKE THE FOLLOWING CHANGES TO THE CONTRACT:
- EFFECTIVE 01 MAY 2024, THE ADMINISTRATIVE CONTRACTING OFFICER (ACO) FOR THE ALLIANT 2 GWAC IS CHANGED FROM JASON SCHMITT TO MELISSA SUGGS.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS IN-SCOPE UNILATERAL MODIFICATION TO THE ALLIANT 2 GWAC IS TO RAISE THE CONTRACT CEILING FROM $82.5B TO $90.75B.

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0047 (PO0006) awarded to ECS FEDERAL, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS UNILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO PROVIDE A 90-DAY FORBEARANCE ON PERFORMANCE MILESTONES AND DELIVERABLES IN CONTRACT YEAR TWO OF THE ALLIANT 2 MASTER CONTRACT. THE MODIFICATION IS HEREBY ISSUED TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: PERFORMANCE BASED STANDARD (PBS) 90 DAY FORBEARANCE DUE DATE
CONTRACTOR ENGAGEMENT, PARTICIPATION 10/01/2020 CONTRACTOR ENGAGEMENT, PRODUCTION 10/01/2020 SMALL BUSINESS SUBCONTRACT REPORTING 06/30/2020 (60 DAY EXTENSION GRANTED BY SBA) ENVIRONMENTAL OBJECTIVES AND REQUIREMENTS GHG INVENTORY REPORTING 08/31/2020 THE CHANGE IS NOT AN EXTENSION OR RESCHEDULING OF SUBSEQUENT CONTRACT YEARS' PERFORMANCE MILESTONE AND DELIVERABLES. FOR CHANGES TO ACTIVE TASK ORDERS, PRIME CONTRACTORS ARE DIRECTED TO CONTACT THE ORDERING CONTRACTING OFFICER (OCO).NO FURTHER CHANGES ARE AUTHORIZED THROUGH THE CHANGE ORDER. THE APPLICATION OF FORBEARANCE PERIOD ACTIVITY IS OPTIONAL AND LIMITED TO ONE CONTRACT YEAR'S PAST PERFORMANCE ASSESSMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
